visual_description: A young man in a black shirt stands in front of a metal-barred window, his gaze directed slightly downward. A middle-aged man in a light-colored suit is shown in close-up, his face partially illuminated in dim lighting. Both appear stationary, with the young man’s posture slightly hunched and the older man’s head turned slightly to the side.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
